summary: Completed comprehensive end-to-end testing of AI Founder Copilot SaaS dashboard. All major features working perfectly including landing page, dashboard navigation, AI generation, guardrails, and multi-page functionality. Backend APIs 90% functional with one timeout issue. Frontend 100% functional with excellent UX.

minor_issues.issue: Occasional timeout on complex startup queries (30+ second processing time)
minor_issues.impact: Some valid queries may timeout, but retry mechanism works
minor_issues.workaround: Users can retry the query or use simpler prompts

passed_tests: Landing page loads with beautiful teal gradient hero section
Navigation bar with FounderCopilot logo and action buttons working
'Try Copilot Free' button successfully navigates to dashboard
Dashboard shows all 4 stat cards (Plans Generated: 24, This Week: 7, Tasks Completed: 45, Avg Progress: 72%)
Quick Actions section displays all 4 workflow buttons (Validate, Growth, Weekly, Funnel)
Recent Plans section shows 4 plans with progress bars and action buttons
This Week's Tasks shows circular progress (40%) and clickable task items
Industry Templates section displays all 4 templates (SaaS, E-commerce, Agency, Marketplace)
Resources preview section shows 2 resource cards with proper styling
Sidebar contains search bar and is fully functional
Sidebar has correct sections: Main (Dashboard, Generate Plan, History, Templates), Workspace (Progress, Resources), Account (Settings)
Generate Plan page loads with large input textarea and proper placeholder
Templates page shows 4 template cards and custom templates section
Progress Tracker page displays stats, large progress bar, and task list with add button
Resources page shows 4 resource cards and 6 category tags
AI generation works perfectly - generates structured output with Strategy, Actions, Execution Plan, Risks, Insight, and Confidence cards
Smart actions (Regenerate, Make aggressive, Reduce budget, Save Plan) all functional
Guardrail works perfectly - 'Tell me a joke' returns proper out of scope error
Loading state with skeleton cards displays during AI processing
All navigation between pages works smoothly
Responsive design elements working correctly
Backend health check endpoint working (200 OK)
Backend guardrail endpoints blocking inappropriate requests correctly
Backend plan generation with modifiers (aggressive, budget) working
Backend status endpoints (POST/GET) working perfectly
Response structure validation - all required JSON fields present and properly formatted

success_percentage.backend: 90% (9/10 tests passed - one timeout issue on complex queries)
success_percentage.frontend: 100% (25/25 tests passed - all features working perfectly)
